title: Race in similar codes gives different results

features.name: xor assignment with clock as operand
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment where a combinational output is computed from a registered signal XOR'ed with the clock signal directly

features.name: registered signal used in clock-edge condition
features.description: Code should include a registered signal that is both updated on a clock edge and used in a conditional expression within the same or another clocked always block

features.name: stop assertion in clocked always block with cycle condition
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block with assertion checks using $stop that depend on cycle counter conditions
